After an unsuccessful ritual that coincided with a devastating hurricane, the tribe lost faith in [PAWN_nameDef] power. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} narrowly escaped reprisals.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cult_Priest.title: Cult priest
Priest
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cult_Priest.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] is a tribal cult minister. It is {PAWN_gender ? he : she} who is responsible for the correct performance of the rituals.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Sage.title: Sage
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Sage.description: [PAWN_nameDef] reads many scrolls and manuscripts, eventually becoming the most intelligent person in the tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Military_Leader.d: [PAWN_nameDef] spent all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life in military campaigns, capturing the enemies of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Astrologer.title: Astrologer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Astrologer.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] spent all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life in military campaigns, capturing the enemies of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Chronicler.title: Chronicler
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Chronicler.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] engaged in the compilation of temporary chronicles of the life of the tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Tanner.title: Tanner
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Tanner.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] works with leather and deals with its processing.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Forest_Killer.des: [PAWN_nameDef] is renowned in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} excellent bow skill. [PAWN_nameDef] never returns home without prey.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bricklayer.title: Bricklayer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bricklayer.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] specializes in stone processing and home construction.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Squire.title: Squire
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Squire.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] is good at weapons, having spent {PAWN_gender ? his : her} entire life in military campaigns.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Field_Priest.desc: After [PAWN_nameDef] became high priest, the tribe began a fierce war. [PAWN_nameDef]'s job was to raise morale through rituals.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Battle_Shaman.des: [PAWN_nameDef] is proficient in weapons and ancient spells. According to legends, it is they who {PAWN_gender ? he : she} lp the tribe to win battles.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Ruthless_Predator: There seems to be nothing human left in him. [PAWN_nameDef] is ruthless and cruel when it comes to fighting within the tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Spellcaster.title: Spellcaster
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Spellcaster.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] sincerely believes in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} strength, like [PAWN_nameDef]'s fellow tribesmen. According to legend, [PAWN_nameDef] is able to stop a tornado with just one word.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Milkman.title: Milkman
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Milkman.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] breeds cows and muffalo for milk, which is considered valuable in [PAWN_nameDef]'s tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Boatman.title: Boatman
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Boatman.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] and {PAWN_gender ? his : her} family build boats and small rafts for the tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Leader_Slave.desc: All {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life [PAWN_nameDef] was a slave for the {PAWN_gender ? he : she} ad of the tribe, but escaped during a battle with foreigners.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Slave_Leader.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] and {PAWN_gender ? his : her} friends were all their lives slaves of cruel masters who did not expect them to take up arms.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Exiled_Avenger.de: [PAWN_nameDef] was expelled from the tribe in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} youth for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} violent disposition and irreconcilable character. [PAWN_nameDef] took revenge on all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} offenders and found refuge in the remote mountains.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Potter.title: Potter
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Potter.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] enjoys crafting tableware for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribal community.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Traveler.title: Traveler
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Traveler.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] spent all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life alone, exploring the planet.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bard.title: Bard
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bard.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a good and pleasant voice which {PAWN_gender ? he : she} lps {PAWN_gender ? him : her} to cheer up [PAWN_nameDef]'s fellow tribesmen before a fight.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Blacksmith.title: Blacksmith
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Blacksmith.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] is adept at blacksmithing and making weapons for [PAWN_nameDef]'s tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Forest_Hunter.des: [PAWN_nameDef] hunts big game in the forest for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Nature_Lover.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] loves the world around {PAWN_gender ? him : her} and the wildlife with all {PAWN_gender ? his : her} soul, not allowing the thought of killing or destroying this harmony.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Head_Hunter.title: Head hunter
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Head_Hunter.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] takes pleasure in killing people. [PAWN_nameDef] often keeps close to nomadic tribes, taking food from them.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Seaman.title: Seaman
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Seaman.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] lives on a small ship on which {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe travels.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Northern.title: Northern
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Northern.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] has lived {PAWN_gender ? his : her} entire adult life in the north, breeding deer.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Desert_Dweller.de: All {PAWN_gender ? his : her} adult life [PAWN_nameDef] has been in the desert and has adapted to life in it.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Wasteland_Dweller: All {PAWN_gender ? his : her} adult life [PAWN_nameDef] has been in the wasteland and has adapted to life in it.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Battle_Rider.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] fights bravely astride {PAWN_gender ? his : her} beloved pet - the huge elephant Winston.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cave_Guard.title: Cave guard
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cave_Guard.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] guards the peace of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe, which has settled in a deep network of caves.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Warchief_Guard.de: [PAWN_nameDef] always served with faith and truth to {PAWN_gender ? his : her} leader, saving {PAWN_gender ? him : her} from conspiracies and troubles.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cave_Dweller.desc: All {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life [PAWN_nameDef] lived in a huge network of underground caves with {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Wanderer.title: Wanderer
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Wanderer.descript: For a long time [PAWN_nameDef] has been wandering the world in search of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} destiny, having left [PAWN_nameDef]'s own tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Legendary_Warrior: [PAWN_nameDef] subtly appears in front of the enemy at the right moment, each time deciding the outcome of the battle in favor of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Lore_Keeper.title: Lore keeper
Keeper
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Lore_Keeper.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] is the source of the tribe's knowledge, knowing numerous recipes and rituals.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Winemaker.title: Winemaker
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Winemaker.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] has long been involved in growing vines and preparing wine for [PAWN_nameDef]'s tribal community.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Slaver.title: Slaver
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Slaver.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] travels with a tribal caravan and sells slaves to everyone.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Baker.title: Baker
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Baker.description: All {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life [PAWN_nameDef] works in a small hut on the outskirts of the tribe and bakes bread from flour.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Architect.title: Architect
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Architect.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] builds stone buildings for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribal community.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Wandering_Merchan: [PAWN_nameDef] prefers to walk alone or surrounded by pack animals, moving from one settlement to another and engaging in trade.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cooper.title: Cooper
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cooper.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] creates barrels and other wood products for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe, sometimes trading.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Scribe.title: Scribe
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Scribe.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in rewriting books and scrolls of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe, thus preserving ancient knowledge.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Carpenter.title: Carpenter
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Carpenter.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] is a master when it comes to working with wood.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Beekeeper.title: Beekeeper
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Beekeeper.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] breeds bees and produces honey for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Rhetorician.title: Rhetorician
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Rhetorician.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] is proficient in speech and is able to inspire any member of the tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Digger.title: Digger
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Digger.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] is involved in building and leveling surfaces for various jobs in the tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Horse_Archer.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] is a mobile and agile fighter of a warlike tribe.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Woodcutter.title: Woodcutter
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Woodcutter.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] lives a short distance from the tribal center, deforestation and planting new trees.
